title: Evidence Timeline Cockpit
prompt:
Create "NEXUS Evidence Timeline Cockpit", a dark AI workflow operations UI. 16:9.
Top: compact workflow graph with node status rings. Bottom: horizontal execution timeline with run steps, checkpoints, errors, artifacts, duration bars. Right: Brain Diagnosis panel showing "slow node", "packet mismatch", "artifact saved", "recommended fix".
Include filters: Run, Node, Artifact, Error, Model settings. Style: quiet ops dashboard, precise, high-density, green/amber/rose status system.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
